completed_steps.summary: Classified repository as a multi-part monorepo with backend, frontend, and infrastructure parts
Inventoried existing README, OpenAPI, description, and workflow documentation under docs, backend, frontend, and infrastructure
Captured stack summaries for Express-based backend services, Expo Router frontend, and Pulumi infrastructure
Documented backend API contracts and data model summaries from OpenAPI and source file locations
Generated source tree analysis with annotated critical directories and entry points
Generated development and deployment guidance from package manifests, READMEs, Docker Compose, SAM, and Pulumi files
Documented cross-part integration architecture for HTTP, WebSocket, event bus, and stack output dependencies
Generated part-specific architecture documents for backend, frontend, and infrastructure
Wrote supporting overview, component inventory, development, deployment, API, and data model documents

findings.project_classification: Multi-part TypeScript monorepo with backend, frontend, and infrastructure segments

technology_stack.backend: Node.js 20, Express 5, MongoDB, Redis, AWS SAM
technology_stack.frontend: Expo 55, React Native 0.83, Expo Router, TanStack Query
technology_stack.infrastructure: Pulumi with AWS S3, CloudFront, ACM, and Route53

notes: Quick scan included targeted reads of key manifests, READMEs, OpenAPI files, Docker Compose, SAM, Pulumi, and selected runtime entry points
backend/package.json references a gateway workspace that is not present in the current tree

resume_instructions: Resume at step_11 to validate generated docs or run a deeper scan for field-level schema and implementation detail.
